issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent attacks you), not 'OnAttacked'. 'OnAttacked' typically means when this card is attacked.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' condition. Should include OncePerTurn or similar turn-limiting condition.
Missing cost actions: must rest 1 DON!! card AND rest this Character before power boost can be applied. Actions should include Rest effects with conditions.
'during this battle' is correct as EndOfBattle, but context suggests this is a cost-based conditional effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards and this Character: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this battle.
